hero.headline: 41 skills and expert agents for Claude Code and Codex.
hero.subheading: Automate the full development workflow — from planning and spec writing to code generation, review, and release without leaving your terminal.

problemSolution.title: The workflow gets lighter when the toolkit carries the repeatable work.

before.title: Without the toolkit
items: You rewrite planning prompts and acceptance criteria for every task.
You move between scattered notes, review checklists, and release steps by hand.
You rely on general-purpose agents that do not know your development workflow.

after.title: With the toolkit
items: `ywc-plan` and `ywc-task-generator` turn rough goals into implementation-ready work.
`ywc-code-gen` and `ywc-impl-review` keep build, review, and verification loops explicit.
`/ywc-agentic` and specialist agents route complex work to the right mode for Claude Code or Codex.

items.label: Claude Code skills
items.description: Planning, spec writing, implementation, review, release, and maintenance workflows packaged for Claude Code.

items.label: Claude Code agents
items.description: Custom specialist agents for architecture, security, performance, root cause analysis, and language-specific review.

items.label: Codex skills
items.description: The same workflow coverage adapted for Codex, with Codex-native instructions and plugin packaging.

items.label: Codex agents
items.description: Read-only specialist agents that complement `ywc-*` skills inside Codex workspaces.

installSteps.title: Install from the plugin paths.
installSteps.description: Use the marketplace path for Claude Code or the Codex plugin marketplace path. These paths have no prerequisites.

steps.instruction: Add the marketplace source in Claude Code, then install `ywc-agent-toolkit` from the Plugin UI Marketplaces tab.
Add the repository as a Codex plugin marketplace source.

socialProof.title: Community proof
socialProof.emptyState: Community quotes will be added after launch.

items.question: What is this?
items.answer: `ywc-agent-toolkit` is a public toolkit of skills and custom agents for Claude Code and Codex. It helps you run repeatable development workflows from planning through release.

items.question: What are the installation requirements?
items.answer: Plugin-marketplace and Codex-plugin installation have no prerequisites. Use the commands above, then install from the matching plugin UI or marketplace.

items.question: What is the cost or token impact?
items.answer: The toolkit itself is open source and does not add a paid service. Token usage depends on how often you invoke the skills and agents in Claude Code or Codex.

items.question: Does it work with both Claude Code and Codex?
items.answer: Yes. Both tools receive 41 skills. Claude Code includes 12 custom agents, while Codex includes 7 custom agents.

items.question: Do I need to clone the repository?
items.answer: No for the paths covered on this page. Claude Code marketplace installation and Codex plugin marketplace installation are designed to install without manual cloning.

items.question: Can I keep using my existing workflow?
items.answer: Yes. The toolkit adds reusable skills such as `ywc-plan`, `ywc-code-gen`, and `ywc-impl-review`; it does not require a backend, account, or project migration.
